zh.lifeSummary: Anna Maria Barbara於1721年出生在德國貝也。她於大約1755年與Bartholomeus Schumacher在美國馬里蘭州弗雷德里克結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1780年享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Anna Maria Barbara于1721年出生在德国貝也。她于大约1755年与Bartholomeus Schumacher在美国马里兰州弗雷德里克结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1780年享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

nameMeanings.name: Maria
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Maria  , of German origin but now also moderately popular in the English-speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: Barbara
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin, meaning ‘foreign woman’ (a feminine form of barbarus ‘foreign’, from Greek, referring originally to the unintelligible chatter of foreigners, which sounded to the Greek ear like no more than bar-bar). St Barbara has always been one of the most popular saints in the calendar, although there is some doubt whether she ever actually existed. According to legend, she was imprisoned in a tower and later murdered by her father, who was then struck down by a bolt of lightning. Accordingly, she is the patron of architects, stonemasons, and fortifications, and of firework makers, artillerymen, and gunpowder magazines.

variants.name: Barbra
meanings: From Latin, meaning ‘foreign woman’ (a feminine form of barbarus ‘foreign’, from Greek, referring originally to the unintelligible chatter of foreigners, which sounded to the Greek ear like no more than bar-bar). St Barbara has always been one of the most popular saints in the calendar, although there is some doubt whether she ever actually existed. According to legend, she was imprisoned in a tower and later murdered by her father, who was then struck down by a bolt of lightning. Accordingly, she is the patron of architects, stonemasons, and fortifications, and of firework makers, artillerymen, and gunpowder magazines.

en.lifeSummary: Anna Maria Barbara was born in 1721, in Bavaria, Germany. She married Bartholomeus Schumacher about 1755, in Frederick, Maryland, United States. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. She died about 1780, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Anna Maria Barbara est née en 1721, à Bayern, Allemagne. Elle a épousé Bartholomeus Schumacher environ 1755, à Frederick, Maryland, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1780, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Anna Maria Barbara wurde 1721 in Bayern, Deutschland geboren. Sie hat um 1755 in Frederick, Maryland, Vereinigte Staaten Bartholomeus Schumacher geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb um 1780 im Alter von 60 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Anna Maria Barbara è nata il nel 1721 nel Bayern, Germania. Lei sposato Bartholomeus Schumacher circa 1755, nel Frederick, Maryland, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì circa 1780, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anna Maria Barbaraは1721年にドイツバイエルンで生まれた。約1755年にアメリカ合衆国メリーランド州フレデリックでBartholomeus Schumacherと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1780年に60歳で死去した。

ko.Frederick, Maryland, British Colonial Am: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 메릴랜드 주 프레더릭크
ko.Loudoun, Virginia, British Colonial Amer: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 루다운
ko.lifeSummary: Anna Maria Barbara(은)는 1721년 독일 베이른에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1755년 미국 메릴랜드 주 프레더릭크에서 Bartholomeus Schumacher(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1780년 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Anna Maria Barbara nasceu em 1721, em Bayern, Alemanha. Ela casou-se com Bartholomeus Schumacher aproximadamente 1755, em Frederick, Marilândia, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1780, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Anna Maria Barbara родилась в 1721 г. в местности беиирн, Германия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Bartholomeus Schumacher около 1755 г. в местности фредирикк, Мэриленд, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла около 1780 г. в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Anna Maria Barbara nació en 1721, en Bayern, Alemania. Se casó con Bartholomeus Schumacher aproximadamente 1755, en Frederick, Maryland, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1780, a la edad de 60 años.
